title: Early Iran strikes cost $5.6 billion in munitions, Pentagon estimates
summary_full: The figure, accounting for the war’s first two days, is likely to intensify concerns in Congress that U.S. forces are churning through a scarce supply of advanced weaponry.
summary_public: The figure, accounting for the war’s first two days, is likely to intensify concerns in Congress that U.S. forces are churning through a scarce supply of advanced weaponry.

IR.label: negative
